title: SprintStoryReturnSchema
description: Per-story return value from sprint_pipeline.js. The calling skill persists results to state file and story frontmatter.

branch.description: Story branch name created during implementation (e.g., story/12-auth-endpoint).

prUrl.description: GitHub mode only. PR URL opened by the story branch.

commits.description: Commit SHAs produced by the story.

blockers.description: Free-text descriptions of why the story is blocked. Populated when status = blocked.

reason.description: Free-text explanation when status = failed or blocked.
